message:
feat(semantic): incremental embedding in watch mode + convert to git deps for release

Incremental semantic embedding (inspired by #90):
- Add append_to_index() to SemanticIndexer using FSVI WAL-based append
- Add watermark tracking via meta table (last_embedded_message_id)
- Add fetch_messages_for_embedding_since() for delta queries
- Wire into watch mode with configurable cooldown (CASS_WATCH_SEMANTIC_COOLDOWN_SECS, default 60s)
- Skip bulk re-embed on watch restart when index + watermark exist
- Reset cooldown on error to prevent rapid-fire retry spam
- Use raw DB max id for watermark to avoid re-fetch loops on filtered messages
- Safe i64 cast via try_from for u64 message ids

Release infrastructure:
- Convert all 9 path dependencies to git deps with pinned revisions for CI builds
- Regenerate Cargo.lock for git-sourced dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
